events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established when Jonathan Russell presented credentials as American Minister Plenipotentiary to Sweden, opening a U.S. Legation in Stockholm.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on April 29, 1818, when Jonathan Russell presented his credentials as American Minister Plenipotentiary to Sweden.

events.event_description: U.S. Legation elevated to Embassy status with the appointment of H. Freeman Matthews as the first U.S. Ambassador to Sweden.

evidence.quote: On September 20, 1947, H. Freeman Matthews was appointed to be the first U.S. Ambassador to Sweden.
